framework.name: Five-Stage AI Transformation Framework
framework.description: Diagnose→Governance→Redesign→Reuse/Literacy→Iterate. Field-tested framework for moving past pilot stage. Stages are interdependent, not sequential.
framework.raw_quote: the difference between success and failure rarely hinged on the algorithm itself
